Uploaded January 11th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Focus Effect vs Effect
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 4:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256016871
17 posts
I need some help undestanding what the difference is between focus effects and effects. I got these slippers for the haste. I am a monk and you understand why I want haste items. Do I get any haste benifit from these if I am not a caster.

Fooguy
LVL 38 mnk Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
RE: Focus Effect vs Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2003 at 9:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259263188
3 posts
Focus Effects have an effect on spells not on your character directly.

This specific effect makes you cast spells faster then normaly. Other Focus Effects can have an effect on spell duration or effectiveness.

The item that would give your character haste would have a label saying; Effect: Haste (worn)
▲ Page top
RE: Focus Effect vs Effect
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2003 at 6:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780202058
10 posts
a focus effect is an equipped effect an effect is normally a right clicky

Torben Sureblade, 37 Ranger (Bristlebane)
▲ Page top
RE: mine are different
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 11:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772199663
9 posts
Welcome to the wonderful world of Focus Effects, guys. As of the June 5th patch, a LOT of the current items now have focus effects. Imagine my surprise when i realized that about 1/2 of the crap i was wearing now made me uber.. lol.

As for the haste question, it's SPELL Haste... cast your spells faster.

Enjoy all the new effects. The list of all of them is at http://eq.castersrealm.com

Urzai Stratocasters
27th Microwave

Edited, Thu Jun 6 12:06:59 2002

Drop
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2001 at 10:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248495690
3 posts
This item is dropped by the Ice goblin Scryer in Permafrost. He is a semi-rare spawn. we camped him for 6 hours and he spawned 7 times. We got the slippers each time even though it is said to be his rare drop. He dont spawn evertime and spawn time is 20 to 25 min. His PH can be any of the common mobs of Permafrost.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 12 2000 at 4:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Apparently you didn't read it... It is dropped by the infamous mob "creatures" that seems to have just about every item in the game on it's loot tables... I think the *** GOBLIN KNIGHT is it's placeholder.
